data.name: WelcomeDescription
data.value: Upload, extract, validate, and manage invoice data.

data.name: AppSubtitle
data.value: OCR, extraction, validation and audit workflow

data.name: PageNotFoundDescription
data.value: The page you are trying to access does not exist or has been changed.

data.name: AccessDeniedDescription
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: SystemErrorDescription
data.value: An error occurred while processing the request.

data.name: DevelopmentErrorDescription
data.value: If the application is running in Development, you can view more details in the console or application output.

data.name: DashboardSubtitle
data.value: Overview of the invoice information extraction system.

data.name: DashboardDateRangeFilterDescription
data.value: Filter dashboard metrics by invoice issue date range.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The start date must be earlier than or equal to the end date.

data.name: DashboardLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load dashboard data. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: InvoiceListSubtitle
data.value: Search and track the processing status of uploaded invoices.

data.name: InvoiceSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by invoice number or vendor...

data.name: InvoiceListLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load the invoice list. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: NoInvoicesMatchSearch
data.value: No invoices match the current search criteria.

data.name: UploadInvoiceSubtitle
data.value: Upload an invoice image so the system can store it, run OCR, extract data, and create an invoice record.

data.name: SupportedImageFormats
data.value: Currently supported: JPG, JPEG, PNG, TIF, TIFF. PDF will be supported in a later phase.

data.name: SaveInvoiceFileToStorage
data.value: Save the invoice file to storage.

data.name: ParseOcrTextToInvoiceData
data.value: Parse OCR text into invoice data.

data.name: CreateInvoiceInDatabase
data.value: Create an invoice in the database.

data.name: UnsupportedInvoiceFileFormat
data.value: Unsupported file format. Please select JPG, JPEG, PNG, TIF, or TIFF.

data.name: FileSizeExceeded
data.value: The file exceeds the allowed size ({0}).

data.name: PleaseSelectFileBeforeUpload
data.value: Please select a file before uploading.

data.name: InvoiceUploadProcessedSuccessfully
data.value: The invoice was uploaded and processed successfully. It is now pending review.

data.name: InvoiceUploadFailed
data.value: An error occurred while uploading and processing the invoice. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: InvoiceDetailSubtitle
data.value: Track extracted data, line items, and validation issues for this invoice.

data.name: InvoiceRejectedWarning
data.value: This invoice has been rejected. You can move it back to pending review if you want to process it again.

data.name: InvoiceNotFoundDescription
data.value: The invoice does not exist or has been deleted.

data.name: SourceFileViewerDescription
data.value: View the original invoice file or stored page previews.

data.name: NoSourceFileAvailable
data.value: No source file is available for this invoice.

data.name: PreviewNotAvailable
data.value: Preview is not available for this file type.

data.name: CannotApproveDueToValidationErrors
data.value: The invoice cannot be approved while unresolved Error-level validation issues remain.

data.name: ExtractionHistoryDescription
data.value: Review OCR and AI extraction attempts for this invoice.

data.name: InvoiceDetailLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load invoice detail. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: InvoiceApprovedSuccessfully
data.value: The invoice has been approved successfully.

data.name: InvoiceApproveFailed
data.value: Unable to approve the invoice. Please check validation errors or system logs.

data.name: InvoiceRejectFailed
data.value: Unable to reject the invoice. Please check the system logs.

data.name: InvoiceMovedToPendingReviewSuccessfully
data.value: The invoice has been moved back to pending review.

data.name: InvoiceMoveToPendingReviewFailed
data.value: Unable to move the invoice back to pending review. Please check the system logs.

data.name: ValidationPageSubtitle
data.value: Track issues detected during invoice data validation.

data.name: SearchValidationIssuesPlaceholder
data.value: Search by invoice number, vendor, rule, or error message...

data.name: NoValidationIssuesDescription
data.value: No validation issues match the current filter.

data.name: ValidationIssueListLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load validation issues. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: EditInvoiceSubtitle
data.value: Correct data extracted from OCR/AI. The system will then re-run consistency validation.

data.name: VendorIdHelpText
data.value: This phase uses VendorId. It can be replaced by a Vendor dropdown later.

data.name: NoVendorsAvailable
data.value: No vendors are available. Please create a vendor before editing this invoice.

data.name: AtLeastOneLineItemRequired
data.value: The invoice must have at least one line item.

data.name: EditNoteRunValidation
data.value: After saving, the system will re-run consistency validation.

data.name: EditNoteReplaceOldValidationIssues
data.value: Previous issues will be replaced by the new validation result.

data.name: EditNoteOriginalOcrNotModified
data.value: The original OCR data is not modified. Only normalized invoice data is updated.

data.name: InvoiceMustHaveAtLeastOneLineItem
data.value: The invoice must have at least one line item.

data.name: InvoiceSavedAndRevalidatedSuccessfully
data.value: The invoice was saved successfully. The system has re-run data consistency validation.

data.name: InvoiceSaveFailed
data.value: Unable to save the invoice. Please check the data or logs for more details.

data.name: InvoiceEditLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load invoice data for editing.

data.name: AuditLogsSubtitle
data.value: Track create, update, delete, and processing actions in the system.

data.name: AuditSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by entity, entity id, user, source, or JSON...

data.name: NoAuditLogsMatchFilter
data.value: No logs match the current filter.

data.name: AuditLogsLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load audit logs. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: SettingsSubtitle
data.value: View the current OCR, AI, file storage, and runtime configuration.

data.name: FileStorageDescription
data.value: Configuration for storing uploaded invoice files.

data.name: AiSettingsDescription
data.value: AI parser configuration for normalizing OCR results.

data.name: ApiKeyHiddenWarning
data.value: The real API key is not displayed in the UI to avoid exposing sensitive information.

data.name: SettingsReadOnlyNote
data.value: This screen only displays the current runtime configuration and does not allow direct editing yet.

data.name: SettingsConfigSourceNote
data.value: OCR and AI configuration should be changed through appsettings.Development.json, environment variables, or user secrets.

data.name: OpenAiApiKeyUserSecretsNote
data.value: The OpenAI API key should be stored with dotnet user-secrets and not committed to Git.

data.name: ProductionFileStorageNote
data.value: For production deployment, configure file storage to a dedicated folder instead of storing files under bin.

data.name: SystemSettingsLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load system settings. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: ExtractionComparePageTitle
data.value: OCR and OCR + AI Comparison - OAI

data.name: ExtractionCompareSubtitle
data.value: Compare rule-based OCR and OCR combined with AI on the same raw text.

data.name: ExtractionComparisonLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to compare extraction results. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: FieldMustBeNonNegative
data.value: {0} must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceTotalMismatch
data.value: The declared total amount does not match subtotal plus tax. Subtotal: {Subtotal}, Tax: {Tax}, Total: {Total} {Currency}.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceSubtotalMismatch
data.value: The declared subtotal does not match the sum of line net amounts.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceTaxMismatch
data.value: The declared tax amount does not match the sum of line tax amounts.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceMissingIssueDate
data.value: The invoice issue date is missing.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceMissingLineItems
data.value: The invoice does not contain any line items.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceLineAmountMismatch
data.value: Line {LineNo} amount does not match quantity multiplied by unit price.

data.name: Validation.InvoiceDueDateBeforeIssueDate
data.value: The due date cannot be earlier than the issue date.

data.name: Action.InvoiceUploadProcessed
data.value: The invoice was uploaded and processed successfully.

data.name: Action.InvoiceFileStored
data.value: The invoice file was stored successfully.

data.name: System.OcrExtractionFailed
data.value: OCR extraction failed. Please check the uploaded file quality or system logs.

data.name: System.InvoiceCreationFailed
data.value: Unable to create the invoice record.

data.name: Invoice.LineItemsRequired
data.value: At least one line item is required.

data.name: Invoice.LineItemNotFound
data.value: Invoice line item '{LineItemId}' was not found.

data.name: Invoice.InvalidStatusForApprove
data.value: Invoice status '{Status}' does not allow approval.

data.name: Invoice.InvalidStatusForReject
data.value: Invoice status '{Status}' does not allow rejection.

data.name: Invoice.InvalidStatusForMoveToPendingReview
data.value: Invoice status '{Status}' does not allow moving to pending review.

data.name: System.InvoiceNotFound
data.value: The invoice could not be found.

data.name: System.InvalidInvoiceStatus
data.value: The current invoice status does not allow this action.

data.name: System.UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or check the system logs.

data.name: DashboardEmptyDescription
data.value: No dashboard data is available yet.

data.name: LoginSubtitle
data.value: Sign in to access the OAI invoice processing system.

data.name: ActionNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: UploadNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to upload invoices.

data.name: EditInvoiceNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to edit invoices.

data.name: ApproveInvoiceNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to approve invoices.

data.name: RejectInvoiceNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to reject invoices.

data.name: MoveInvoiceToPendingReviewNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to move invoices to pending review.

data.name: VendorManagementSubtitle
data.value: Create, update, and search vendors used in invoice processing.

data.name: NoVendorsDescription
data.value: No vendors match the current filter.

data.name: VendorSaveFailed
data.value: Unable to save vendor. Please check the data or system logs.

data.name: VendorListLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load vendors. Please check the system logs.

data.name: ManageVendorsNotAllowed
data.value: You do not have permission to manage vendors.

data.name: QuickCreateVendorDescription
data.value: Create a vendor without leaving the current workflow.

data.name: ConfirmApproveInvoiceMessage
data.value: This invoice will be marked as approved. This action will be recorded in the audit log.

data.name: ConfirmRejectInvoiceMessage
data.value: This invoice will be marked as rejected. This action will be recorded in the audit log.

data.name: ConfirmMoveToPendingReviewMessage
data.value: This invoice will be moved back to pending review for further checking.

data.name: ConfirmSaveInvoiceMessage
data.value: The invoice data will be saved and validation will run again.

data.name: ConfirmUploadInvoiceMessage
data.value: The selected file will be uploaded, processed by OCR, and stored as an invoice record.

data.name: ConfirmCreateVendorMessage
data.value: A new vendor will be created and can be used in invoice processing.

data.name: ConfirmUpdateVendorMessage
data.value: The vendor information will be updated.

data.name: ValidationIssuesTabDescription
data.value: Review data consistency issues detected for this invoice.

data.name: DemoDataToolsSubtitle
data.value: Seed sample vendors, invoices, validation issues, and extraction history for thesis demonstration.

data.name: DevelopmentOnlyWarning
data.value: This tool is only available in the Development environment.

data.name: DemoDataSeedFailed
data.value: Unable to seed demo data. Please check the system logs.

data.name: DemoDataResetFailed
data.value: Unable to reset demo data. Please check the system logs.

data.name: ConfirmResetDemoDataMessage
data.value: This will delete demo invoices, line items, validation issues, extraction results, and demo vendors. Identity users and roles will not be deleted.

data.name: SystemHealthSubtitle
data.value: Check database, configuration, demo data, and runtime status.

data.name: SystemHealthEmptyMessage
data.value: No system health result is available yet.

data.name: SystemHealthCheckFailed
data.value: Unable to check system health. Please check the system logs.
